name: Buckwheat Oat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
3. Mix until well combined and smooth.
4. Shape dough into a loaf.
5. Place the loaf in a greased baking pan.
6. Bake for 30-40 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
